name: Risk & Position Sizing Calculator
description: Workflow for calculating optimal position sizes, risk/reward ratios, Kelly Criterion position sizing, and portfolio risk metrics for trading.

config.prompt: Collect the following from the user: account balance, risk per trade (percentage), entry price, stop loss price, target price (optional). Also collect: win rate (optional), reward-to-risk ratio (optional), current number of open positions. Return JSON with: accountBalance, riskPercent, entryPrice, stopLoss, targetPrice, winRate, rrRatio, openPositions.

Calculate the following based on input: dollar risk amount, position size (units/contracts), risk per unit, reward-to-risk ratio, potential profit, potential loss, risk/reward. Use standard lot/contract sizes if applicable. Return JSON with: riskAmount, positionSize, units, riskPerUnit, rewardRisk, potentialProfit, potentialLoss, riskRewardRatio.

Calculate Kelly Criterion position sizing if win rate and reward-to-risk provided. Kelly % = W - (1-W)/R where W = win rate and R = risk-reward ratio. Provide fractional Kelly suggestions (Full Kelly, Half Kelly, Quarter Kelly). Also calculate: expected value, optimal risk percentage. Return JSON with: fullKelly, halfKelly, quarterKelly, kellyPercentage, suggestedRisk, expectedValue, kellyRecommendation (string).

Assess portfolio-level risk given current open positions and new trade. Calculate: total portfolio risk, correlation-adjusted risk (if positions provided), max drawdown potential, account risk after trade. Provide risk rating (low/medium/high) and recommendations. Return JSON with: totalPortfolioRisk, maxDrawdownPotential, accountRiskAfterTrade, riskRating, recommendations (array), canProceed (boolean).
